headline: Lennox International (LII) Stock Valuation Check After Recent Steady Performance And Modest Undervaluation Estimate
summary: Lennox International (LII) is back on investor radars after recent trading left the stock at a last close of US$512.15, inviting a closer look at its valuation, returns and underlying business mix. See our latest analysis for Lennox International. Recent moves have been relatively steady, with a 6.48% 90 day share price return and a 2.65% year to date share price return set against a 3.83% decline in 1 year total shareholder return and strong 3 and 5 year total shareholder returns near 70%...
